PoE Learning Platform Perspectives on Entrepreneurship

Flashcards

Spaced repetition over the deck. Switch between the Gielnik / Schuessler blocks and the Group 2 (Farny) track below. Scheduling is stored on this device.

Active Recall

Write your answer from memory, then get an offline keyword score against the answer core. The score is a heuristic, not AI. Use the three-step self-rating to track what you actually knew.

Blurting

A lightweight self-study technique. No separate dataset, just guidance and a checklist of the concepts in a block so you can mark what you missed.

One blurting cycle, about 25 minutes:

  1. Read (about 10 min)Read one block end to end. Do not take notes yet.
  2. Blurt (about 10 min)Close the material. Write everything you remember from memory, in any order, no looking back.
  3. Check (about 5 min)Compare against the concept list below and mark each concept remembered, partial, or missing. The gaps are your next study target.

Statistics

Your progress across the whole deck. Scheduling is exam-oriented: intervals are capped at the exam date, so nothing is scheduled past it.
